## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change (`chore` / `ci`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, runbooks, or ADRs)
- [ ] If architectural — an ADR has been added in `docs/decisions/`
- [ ] Terraform `terraform fmt` and `terraform validate` pass locally
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Conventional Commits format used
